calendar.matters:
DEFAULT HEARING (PROVE UP)
Off Calendar Apr-22-2026 Continued To May-13-26 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 505

DEFAULT HEARING (PROVE UP)
Off Calendar May-13-2026 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar being set for plaintiff's request for entry of default judgment.

Judge Dennis Hayashi; Clerk: Damon Carter; Dept. 505
Proceedings recorded by "For the Record" commencing at 9:20am pausing at 9:22am resuming at 9:44am and concluding at 9:55am.

Plaintiff Creditors Adjustment Bureau appearing represented by Tiffany Brown, Esq. via zoom.
Defendant Safeway Truck Lines LLC not appearing.

Counsel for Plaintiff presents summary of case and an offer of proof.

Court examines Senior Collections Manager for Motive Technoligies and witness for Plaintiff BENJAMIN SEEMAN and he confirms statements made by counsel.

The matter is submitted.

Based on the documents filed, the statement made by Plaintiff and its Counsel, consideration and good cause appearing, the Court RULES in favor of Plaintiff Creditors Adjustment bureau, Inc., and against Defendant Safeway Truck Lines LLC, as follows:

Damages: $39,591.24
Prejudgment Interest: $3,622.86
Attorney Fees: $2,825.00
Costs: $548.23

TOTAL JUDGMENT: $46,587.33

Proposed judgment signed and filed this date.
